title: WYSIWYG text block in forms
excerpt: When designing a form, it’s sometimes critical to display a few paragraphs of text for reference.  In the form editor, a WYSIWYG editor similar to the one used when writing this post would be very handy.  Critical featur…

posts.author: sbry_ripple (Steven Bry)
posts.cookedHtml:
When designing a form, it’s sometimes critical to display a few paragraphs of text for reference. In the form editor, a WYSIWYG editor similar to the one used when writing this post would be very handy. Critical features would include:

  1. Hyperlinked text
  2. Images
  3. Bullets
  4. Can change font family and size
  5. Bold/Italics/Underline
